arts.ttl: Euro giants “very much interested” in signing Chelsea utility man on one condition
arts.sum: Chelsea attacker Joao Felix joined AC Milan on loan during the January transfer window. According to Football Insider, the Italian outfit do not have an obligation to sign him permanently and the player could be set for a return to Chelsea at the end of the season. arts.ttl: Brighton vs Chelsea – FA Cup match preview and team news
arts.sum: Brighton and Chelsea battle it out this weekend for a place in the fifth round of the FA Cup. Coincidentally, Saturday night’s fixture will be replicated next weekend as the two sides face off in the Premier League on Valentine’s Day. The Seagulls advanced into this stage of the competition by emphatically beating Norwich City 4-0 […] The post Brighton vs Chelsea – FA Cup match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool closely monitoring Chelsea transfer target as potential Van Dijk replacement
arts.sum: Liverpool are understood to be closely monitoring Feyenoord defender David Hancko as a potential transfer target for the summer. arts.ttl: Chelsea seduced by 12-G/A Premier League forward, Blues plan to offer £42m
arts.sum: Chelsea are keen on signing the Bournemouth attacker Antoine Semenyo. The 25-year-old Ghanaian winger has been quite impressive in the Premier League this season and he has 12 goal contributions in all competitions. According to Fichajes, Chelsea are seduced by his dynamism and versatility. He has been linked with Arsenal recently. arts.ttl: Brighton vs Chelsea preview: Guiu adds to Blues' injury concerns
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca revealed Marc Guiu suffered a long-term injury in Chelsea’s 2-1 Premier League win over West Ham on Monday. “It doesn’t look like a short injury and exactly how long I don’t know.

arts.ttl: We simulated Brighton vs Chelsea to predict FA Cup fourth round clash
arts.sum: Chelsea have won their last five games against Brighton, most recently a 4-2 win in the Premier League where Cole Palmer scored all four before half-time. A convincing 5-0 win over League Two Morecambe secured Chelsea's spot in the FA Cup fourth round last month, setting up the clash with Brighton after the Seagulls beat Norwich City 4-0.
